title: Acctim Parker Non-Ticking Sweep Loud Bell Alarm Clock (White)
features: SMOOTH OPERATION: Features non-ticking sweep movement, perfect for light sleepers and quiet environments
CLEAR DISPLAY: Large, easy-to-read numbers with clear digits and markers. Luminous hands and backlight for excellent visibility in low light conditions
ALARM FEATURE: Equipped with a loud bell alarm system to ensure you wake up on time, even if you're a heavy sleeper
COMPACT DESIGN: Smart, modern square design in classic finish. Ideal for bedside tables
RELIABLE TIMEKEEPING: Precise quartz movement ensures accurate time-keeping, while the sweep second hand moves smoothly around the dial
description: The Acctim Parker Alarm Clock combines modern functionality with classic design. This sophisticated timepiece features a clear white dial with numbers that are easy to read.. The non-ticking sweep movement offers a peaceful night's sleep, perfect for light sleepers who need their rest undisturbed. The bold, contrasting hands and precise minute markers make time-telling effortless, while the loud bell alarm provides a reliable wake-up call when you need it most. Housed in a sleek case with a contemporary square design, this alarm clock adds a touch of style to any bedside table. The smooth sweep second hand movement creates a seamless timekeeping experience, eliminating the distracting tick-tock sound common in traditional clocks. Whether for your bedroom, office, or as a thoughtful gift, this clock delivers both functionality and aesthetic appeal in one compact package.
